summary: SINGLE_FOCUS annulus ≃ S¹ homotopy equivalence. NumberPlane with BLUE outer ring + GREEN inner ring + fill; ValueTracker s_tr deforms outer boundary R_out → R_in via always_redraw AnnularSector. YELLOW sample dots on 12 rays slide along GREY radial lines from outside to inner circle. Deformation retract; same π_1=ℤ.
